title: Reaching
excerpt: Thanks for all of your sweet comments about the move. Ironically being pregnant is probably helping to keep me grounded and as level headed as possible. I am trying really hard to relax and understand that this is just a…
body: Thanks for all of your sweet comments about the move. Ironically being pregnant is probably helping to keep me grounded and as level headed as possible. I am trying really hard to relax and understand that this is just a fleeting moment. No sense in getting the blood pressure up when this is all going to work out just fine. The only thing I want going up is my spirits and positive outlook on this whole phase. Do you ever feel like there are times when Pinterest reads your mind? Same here.
